nodes.label: Application service for users and invites — depends only on ports.  Use cases:
Lock duration after `cycles` prior consecutive lock cycles: the base     doubled
Commit staged writes once on success; roll back on any failure.
Bootstrap the first user. Raises if the table is empty and no key is set.
Verify login credentials. Raises InvalidCredentials on any mismatch.          Ev
Count a wrong password; lock the account once the threshold is hit.          Con
Platform-admin lifts a login lock (and resets the escalation) — the         reco
Invalidate all of the user's existing JWTs by bumping token_version.
Resolve (or JIT-provision) the local account for a verified SSO identity.
No account is bound to this subject yet: adopt the verified-email account
Platform-admin enables/disables another account. Disabling revokes the         t
Platform-admin issues a single-use, expiring reset token for a user.          Th
Redeem a reset token: validate, set the new password, revoke old JWTs.
